ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of the node (e.g., source, target, intermediate) */,
  "node_description" TEXT /* Description of the node */,
  "creation_time" TEXT /* Time the node was created */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time the node was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edges" (
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edge */,
  "edge_name" TEXT /* Name of the edge */,
  "source_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source node */,
  "target_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target node */,
  "edge_type" TEXT /* Type of the edge (e.g., directed, undirected) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the edge */,
  "creation_time" TEXT /* Time the edge was created */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time the edge was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edges_target_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edges_source_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transitions" (
  "transition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transition */,
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the edge used for the transition */,
  "old_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the old node */,
  "current_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current node */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time of the transition */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of the transition */,
  "transition_type" TEXT /* Type of the transition (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "creation_time" TEXT /* Time the transition was created */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time the transition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transitions_old_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("old_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transitions_current_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transitions_edge_id FOREIGN KEY ("edge_id") REFERENCES edges ("edge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transition_values" (
  "transition_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transition value */,
  "transition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transition */,
  "value_func" TEXT /* Value function used to calculate the expected value */,
  "expected_value" REAL /* Expected value of the transition */,
  "actual_value" REAL /* Actual value of the transition */,
  "difference" REAL /* Difference between the expected and actual values */,
  "creation_time" TEXT /* Time the transition value was created */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time the transition value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transition_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transition_values_transition_id FOREIGN KEY ("transition_id") REFERENCES transitions ("transition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_neighbors" (
  "node_neighbor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node neighbor */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node */,
  "neighbor_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighboring node */,
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the edge between the nodes */,
  "creation_time" TEXT /* Time the node neighbor was created */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time the node neighbor was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_neighbor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_neighbors_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_neighbors_neighbor_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighbor_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_neighbors_edge_id FOREIGN KEY ("edge_id") REFERENCES edges ("edge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "creation_time" TEXT /* Time the user was created */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transition_probabilities" (
  "probability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each probability */,
  "transition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transition */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of the transition */,
  "creation_time" TEXT /* Time the probability was created */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time the probability was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("probability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transition_probabilities_transition_id FOREIGN KEY ("transition_id") REFERENCES transitions ("transition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_transition_counts" (
  "node_transition_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node transition count */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node */,
  "transition_count" INTEGER /* Number of transitions for the node */,
  "creation_time" TEXT /* Time the node transition count was created */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time the node transition count was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_transition_count_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edge_transition_counts" (
  "edge_transition_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edge transition count */,
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the edge */,
  "transition_count" INTEGER /* Number of transitions for the edge */,
  "creation_time" TEXT /* Time the edge transition count was created */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time the edge transition count was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edge_transition_count_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log entry (e.g., debug, info, error) */,
  "creation_time" TEXT /* Time the log entry was created */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transition_value_history" (
  "transition_value_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transition value history */,
  "transition_value_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transition value */,
  "transition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transition */,
  "value_func" TEXT /* Value function used to calculate the expected value */,
  "expected_value" REAL /* Expected value of the transition */,
  "actual_value" REAL /* Actual value of the transition */,
  "difference" REAL /* Difference between the expected and actual values */,
  "creation_time" TEXT /* Time the transition value history was created */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time the transition value history was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transition_value_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transition_value_history_transition_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("transition_value_id") REFERENCES transition_values ("transition_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transition_value_history_transition_id FOREIGN KEY ("transition_id") REFERENCES transitions ("transition_id")
)
